title: IngestSummary
description: Final summary NDJSON line emitted by `sqlite-graphrag ingest` after all per-file events. Always the last line on stdout. backend_invoked added in v1.0.84 by ADR-0042.

summary.description: Sentinel field; always true. Distinguishes this line from per-file events.

pattern.description: Glob pattern used to match files.

files_total.description: Total files matched by the pattern.

files_failed.description: Files that failed processing or persistence.

files_skipped.description: Files skipped (duplicates, invalid names, empty bodies).

backend_invoked.description: v1.0.84 (ADR-0042): backend LLM that ran the live embedding across this ingest run (claude, codex, or none). Omitted when ingest ran without embedding (--skip-embedding-on-failure or backend none).
